series_metadata.series_description: Records associated with the Ohio Department of Natural Resources' (ODNR) biennial capital improvement budget, including, but not limited to, requests, appropriations, and re-appropriations for the individual projects. Also budget submittals, correspondence, guidance documents, and similar documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: or converted electronic format. or when converted electronic format, notify State Archivist potential review. If State Archivist not want paper records shred paper records. ; Electronic: . notify State Archivist potential review. If State Archivist not want electronic records shred electronic records
